project_type: React board game app (Rising Sun adaptation)
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript compilation to check for type errors. No unit tests exist.
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Verify via tsc compilation only.
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch. Commit and push to main.
key_patterns: Game logic lives in src/utils/gameLogic.ts (pure functions). UI state management in src/store/gameStore.ts (Zustand). Components in src/components/. CSS in src/App.css (minified single file). Types in src/types/game.ts. Portals used for popups (createPortal to document.body).
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.ts. src/: App.tsx, App.css, main.tsx. src/components/: All React components. src/store/: gameStore.ts (Zustand). src/utils/: gameLogic.ts (pure game logic), figureImages.ts, cardTranslations.ts, renderCardEffect.tsx. src/types/: game.ts (types + data constants). src/i18n/: internationalization. src/img/: image assets.
